title: I66 closure

title: Federal canonicals architecture
summary: Federate every canonical CSV/MD into owning area-role canonicals/ folder; promote compliance home to v3.0/Admin/O5-1/People/Compliance/canonicals/ (L6 CPO master); create CANONICAL_REGISTRY.csv; per-role Supabase schemas with single underscore (marketing_brand, operations_pmo, etc.) per H6.
notes: Resolves Conundrum 1 + Conundrum 10. Phase 4.5 executes migration in 3 waves; v3.1 release tag follows initiative completion per operator-stated trigger.

title: Envoy Tech Lab consolidation + full v3.0 file-structure regression
summary: Consolidate 2 ETL folders into Admin/O5-1/Envoy Tech Lab/ (Option B); Phase 2 section 2.5 NEW catalogs every v3.0 folder verdict against baseline_organisation.csv reality + the federal canonical pattern.
notes: Resolves Conundrum 2. P2.5 inline-ratify gate ratified 5 verdicts + 2 forward-context expansions; sub-decisions D-IH-70-B.1 through B.5.

title: Data + Tech consolidation: opt-keep-separate
summary: Keep v3.0/Admin/O5-1/Data/ and v3.0/Admin/O5-1/Tech/ as separate top-level areas (current state). Data is statistician-led; Tech is engineer-led; separation respects role-owner-canonical contract.
notes: Re-evaluate on next v3.x review.

title: Research & Logic in git: opt-sparse-mirror
summary: Sparse mirror with LFS for binaries (.docx, .xlsx, .pdf); R&L is classified reference_only per Phase 4 section 11; agent-only content channel pattern per Phase 4 section 14 governs read access.
notes: Drive remains primary authoring surface; git provides agent reading access without ballooning repo. Migration plan defines which 5-10 high-value R&L assets get LFS-tracked first.

title: Temp ingress timebox: opt-timebox
summary: Hybrid with timeboxed staging. temp-move-or-delete-*/ folders are acceptable provided every file has a target-path within 2 weeks; after timebox expires, the temp folder enters CRITICAL state and operator must triage.
notes: Validator (scripts/validate_temp_ingress.py NEW) reads timestamp from folder name + flags overdue.

title: Engagement registry full build: opt-build-now
summary: Build full ENGAGEMENT_REGISTRY.csv + Supabase mirror + ERP panel slot in Phase 8. Engagement count already 4-5 (SUEZ, Asesoria, Service Management internal, future advisers, future Holistik Researcher cohort); build cost low; discipline payoff high.

title: GOI class enrichment: opt-extend-enum + multi-source regression hunt
summary: Extend GOI/POI class enum for trainee + sister-business PLUS perform regression search across all evidence sources (temp-context, R&L, previous-project, current engagements, baseline_organisation, decision-log) to surface additional missed classes. Phase 8 section 8.7 inline-ratify gate via AskQuestion before any non-trainee/sister-business enum extension.
notes: Resolves Conundrum 3.

title: MADEIRA vault structure: opt-hybrid
summary: Programs canonical at System Owner/programs/<product>/ (governance home); product-specific docs at Envoy Tech Lab/<product>/ (artifact home). Aligns with WORKSPACE_BLUEPRINT sub-mark functional split (governance vs delivery).

title: AKOS branding hygiene: opt-strict
summary: No AKOS mention in customer-facing prose anywhere; customer packs use 'Holistika OS' or 'the Holistika methodology' only. Codified in BRAND_JARGON_AUDIT.md section 4.

title: Mirrors completeness: opt-build-now
summary: Add component_service_matrix_mirror for symmetry with other governance views. Goal of the ERP is to facilitate ingestion of massive volume of data/dimensions for humans, with 2-way sync activating when AKOS is completed enough to invite others. Links to Phase 4.6 ERP architecture canonical + Phase 10.5 TSX scaffolds.
notes: Resolves Conundrum 4 (ERP heavy-depth canonical depth) via Phase 4.6 + Phase 10.5 split.

title: docs/wip placement: opt-keep-top-level + MADEIRA-AKOS reserved folder
summary: Keep docs/wip/ at top level interim; CREATE v3.0/Envoy Tech Lab/MADEIRA-AKOS/wip/ (Phase 4.8) as the destination-when-OS-migration-triggers. Phase 4 section 15.2 defines 4 named OS-migration triggers + how-to migration script.
notes: Resolves Conundrum 5.

title: Asesoria as type-5 outbound-internal sister-business
summary: Asesoria Hosteleria engagement classified as type-5 outbound-internal sister-business (related-party + advisory shape; sister hospitality SME). Triggers class enum extension for sister-business in D-IH-70-N.

title: Holistik Researcher = role row + cohort tag
summary: Holistik Researcher is a baseline_organisation.csv role row (already exists as Holistik Researcher Trainee per P13.4); cohort onboarding deferred to I73 (People Operations + Learning curriculum).

title: Class enum extension: trainee + sister-business + multi-source class regression hunt
summary: Extend GOI/POI class enum for trainee + sister-business; Phase 8 section 8.7 executes the multi-source regression hunt (temp-context + R&L + previous-project + current engagements + baseline_organisation + decision-log) to surface additional missed classes; ranked candidate list with citations + operator-ratification gate before any non-trainee/sister-business enum extension.
notes: Resolves Conundrum 3 + scope-extension of D-IH-70-G.

title: Three-tier WIP topology (Research-owned + PMO-owned + area-scoped)
summary: Codify 3-tier WIP topology: Tier 1 docs/wip/intelligence/ (Research-owned, cross-area); Tier 2 docs/wip/planning/ (PMO-owned, initiative-scoped); Tier 3 <area>/<role>/wip/ (area-scoped, role-owned). PMO meta-governs lifecycle universally via SOP-WIP_LIFECYCLE_001 NEW.
notes: Resolves Conundrum 6. Phase 4 section 17 authors WORKSPACE_BLUEPRINT extension.

title: Bilingual README pattern (separate files)
summary: Per-engagement bilingual README authored as 3 separate files at engagement root: README.md (5-line pointer), README.fr.md (full FR), README.en.md (full EN). Per-language validators run independently; per-language Drive sync. Default README.md is brand-only voice with brand cross-link.
notes: Resolves Conundrum 7. Phase 7 section 7.6 NEW codifies; SUEZ engagement README rebuilt per this pattern at Phase 7.

title: People area restructure: Compliance + Ethics + Learning + People Ops
summary: Split Talent monolith (legacy) into 4 sub-roles: Compliance + Ethics + Learning + People Operations. ETHICAL_AUTOMATION_POSTURE.md homed at People/Ethics/canonicals/ (P9). Holistik Researcher onboarding curriculum lives at People/Learning/canonicals/ (deferred to I73).
notes: Resolves Conundrum 8. Brand-positioning rationale: 'we become unethical when we unlearn' is a Holistika differentiator that links Ethics + Learning as inseparable disciplines. Phase 8 section 8.5 executes split.

title: SMO vs Account Management distinction
summary: SMO at Operations/SMO/ owns the WHAT (service catalog + SLAs + change/incident/release management - ITIL-derived). Account Management at Marketing/Resonance/Account Management/ owns the WHO (relationship + retention + customer success). Both active now (not forward-looking) per operator's Batard precedent + EFA maintenance request.
notes: Resolves Conundrum 9. Phase 8 section 8.6 + section 8.4 execute.

title: Research as new top-level area (R2 design: 4 disciplines)
summary: Promote Research from Admin/O5-1/Research/ sub-area to top-level area: Methodology + Intelligence + Diagnosis + Validation as 4 disciplines (mirrors Brand sub-discipline ontology). Existing technique folders (Methodology Pillars, Research Techniques, HUMINT, OSINT, Deep Research, Intelligence Matrix) mapped under disciplines. Roles cross-cut: Research Director + Research Analyst + KM Officer + Holistik Researcher. Research owns docs/wip/intelligence/.
notes: Resolves Conundrum 11. Phase 4.7 NEW executes.

title: Marketing area redesign (M3): Brand + Reach + Resonance + Storytelling + Experimentation
summary: Redesign Marketing into 5 sub-areas using brand-friendly Holistik verbs: Brand (saying) + Reach (extending: acquisition + Demand Generation + Paid Media migrated from Social) + Resonance (deepening: Account Management + Community Manager migrated from Social) + Storytelling (conveying: PR + Thought Leadership + Corporate Marketing) + Experimentation (testing: Growth Hacker + Marketing Analytics). Existing Growth folder + GTM SOPs migrate into Reach.
notes: Resolves Conundrum 12. I67 RevOps Discovery initiative renamed to I72 Marketing Area Governance. Phase 8 section 8.4 executes.

notes: Sub-decision of D-IH-70-B; ratified via inline AskQuestion in I70 P2 execution chat per H1 + .cursor/rules/akos-inline-ratification.mdc. Sub-decision of D-IH-70-B (P2.5 audit inline-ratify gate).

title: P2.5 spot-check Q2 (D-IH-70-B sub): Admin/AI/* historical merge + AIC-as-category framing

Forward-context (load-bearing for P4.8 + P9): AIC is the category for non-MADEIRA AI agents (today including the Cursor-agent operational pattern); MADEIRA was originally conceived as the L6 founder-companion AI agent that today's Cursor-agent interactions empirically embody.
notes: Founder principle 2.7 (computational tipping point) gets a worked-example sub-section at P9 citing this expansion. Sub-decision of D-IH-70-B (P2.5 audit inline-ratify gate).

notes: Sub-decision of D-IH-70-B (P2.5 audit inline-ratify gate).

title: P2.5 spot-check Q4 (D-IH-70-B sub): Corporate Marketing placement + Storytelling/Resonance boundary
summary: Verdict ratified: opt-marketing-storytelling. Corporate Marketing moves to Marketing/Storytelling/Corporate Marketing/. Forward-context boundary contract (load-bearing for P8 section 8.4): Storytelling AUTHORS narrative artifacts (case studies, PR, thought-leadership content); Resonance CONSUMES (Account Management + Community Manager deploy artifacts in 1:1 relationship contexts). Single-ownership preserved by separating verbs author-vs-deploy.
notes: Operator may amend at P8 section 8.4 execution time per inline-ratify discipline. BRAND_DISCIPLINE_ONTOLOGY.md (P5) section 'Marketing M3 sub-area boundaries' codifies if validated. Sub-decision of D-IH-70-B (P2.5 audit inline-ratify gate).

notes: Sub-decision of D-IH-70-B (P2.5 audit inline-ratify gate).

title: baseline_organisation.csv schema extension (sub_area + status) + Marketing M3 row migration (hard-remove Social Media Manager + Growth Manager)
summary: Schema extension Option C ratified at P8 section 8.14 inline-ratify gate (operator response 2026-05-13). The plan-time intent for sub-area encoding and soft-state tracking was not crystallised into columns until v3.1; this decision crystallises it as the Marketing M3 redesign lands. New columns: sub_area (TEXT, hierarchical encoding within an area, e.g. Marketing/Reach, People/Compliance, Operations/SMO; nullable/empty allowed), status (TEXT, enum-checked: active / deprecated / pending; default 'active'). Hard-remove Option B for legacy roles (Growth Manager + Social Media Manager rows deleted, not soft-deprecated; ~20 process_list orphan rows reassigned to new M3 sub-area roles). 10 new role rows added under Marketing M3 sub-areas (Reach Manager, Demand Generation Manager, Resonance Manager, Account Management Manager, Storytelling Manager, PR Manager, Thought Leadership Editor, Experimentation Manager, Growth Hacker, Marketing Analytics Manager). title: GOI/POI stance dimension - new schema column codifying v2.7 ally/neutral/enemy intelligence-ops doctrine
summary: Schema extension at P8.5 inline-ratify gate (operator response 2026-05-13). Operator surfaced the v2.7 ally/neutral/enemy framing during Q5 deliberation — quote: 'to the allies, you give them free or very discounted or price-diluted added value; to the neutrals, you give value × revenue in the best way you can / no beta / no alpha; to the enemies, you never let them pay you, and if they do, make the project valuable enough to warrant sharing our capabilities.' v2.7 had this prose-only; v3.0 captured distance_band but not stance; v3.1 codifies stance as a first-class column on GOI_POI_REGISTER.csv. Schema choice (single column, not bidirectional): the operator's framing classifies entities mutually (one stance per row); engagement-posture rules infer what we offer based on this single value. Bidirectional split (their stance toward us vs our stance toward them) deferred until concrete divergence cases land. Enum: ally / neutral / enemy / unknown / empty (backwards-compatible default). Mirror DDL adds NOT VALID + VALIDATE CONSTRAINT pattern + covering index for stance-based governance queries. Doctrine canonical authored at docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Research/Intelligence/canonicals/GOI_POI_STANCE_DOCTRINE.md (homed under Research/Intelligence/canonicals/ per D-IH-70-W IntelligenceOps placement ratification). All 14 existing rows backfilled with stance values per operator's working knowledge: 8 ally, 5 neutral, 1 ally (Asesoría related-party).
notes: Methodology versioning event continues from D-IH-70-Z (Marketing M3) + D-IH-70-AA (People restructure) + D-IH-70-AB (SMO enrichment). The pattern is now the v3.1 signature: identify a v2.7-prose-only operator concept, ratify single-column schema extension, populate existing rows, document the doctrine in a canonical .md, append decision-register row. This is the third schema-extension event in the same chat session; checkpoint doc captures the methodology versioning audit trail. Cross-references: 20260513150000_i70_p85_goipoi_stance_and_class_enum_extension.sql (mirror DDL), akos/hlk_goipoi_csv.py (FIELDNAMES SSOT), scripts/validate_goipoi_register.py (STANCES enum), tests/test_validate_goipoi_register.py (header invariant moved from related_party to stance), INTELLIGENCE_DISCIPLINE_CHARTER.md (parent canonical).
